calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN ZANGHI FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION; AGENT RAUL ESCARENO ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT DELORES ROBINSON AND MITCHELL POWELL IN PRO PER
NON APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PELE SMITH (IN HOSPITAL)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. SETTLEMENT READ INTO RECORD. DEFENDANT SHALL RETAIN POSSESSSION OF PREMISES SO LONG AS DEFENDANT PAYS THE SUM OF $1156. ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 5, 2004 BY 5PM. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A SECOND INSTALLMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $462. ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 20, 2004. TIME IS OF THE ESSSENCE.EACH PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE WITH EITHER A CASHIER'S CHECK, MONEY ORDER, OR A CHECK DRAWN ON THE ACCOUNT OF EITHER RADCO, CATHOLIC CHARITIES OR OTHER RECOGNIZED PHILANTHROPIC AGENCY. PLAINTIFF WILL ENTER A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND REINSTATE DEFENDANT'S TENANCY SO LONG AS DEFENDANT IS NOT IN DEFAULT WITH RESPECT TO ANY PROVISION OF THIS SETTLEMENT. IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT IS IN DEFAULT WITH ANY PROVISION OF THIS AGREEMENT, UPON 48 HOURS WRITTEN EXPARTE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT, MOVE FOR ENTRY OF A STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES; FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT; AND ANY UNPAID RENT FROM AUGUST 1, 2004 TO SEPTEMBER 30,2004 IN THE AMONT OF $694 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FROM OCTOBER 1, 2004 TO THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AT THE RATE OF $15.40 PER DAY WITH DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE A CREDIT FOR ANY INSTALLMENTS TOWARD BACK RENT AND DAMAGES RECEIVED UNDER THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, COSTS OF SUIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $273.30 AND ATTORNEYS FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1000.
DEFENDANTS ROBINSON AND POWELL WILL HAVE DEFENDANT SMITH INTIAL WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AND DELIVER TO PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY.
TRIAL DATE TO REMAIN AS TO PELE SMITH BUT ON TRIAL DAY, PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY WILL REQUEST A SETTLED PROTECTIVE DATE OF NOVEMBER 1, 2004 TO ALLOW TIME FOR DEFENDANTS TO GET AGREEMENT SIGNED BY DEFENDANT SMITH.

JUDGE PRO TEM:BRADFORD NILSSON;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA (218)
